label: Magicshine Controls
description: Control supported Magicshine lights from the Karoo app or the in-ride field, with lamp selection, quick beam switching, and battery and temperature telemetry.
releaseNotes:
* Added ride screen button
* Added lamp selector gate
* Added support for M2-B0 / M2-BO / M1-B0 / M1-BO lamps
* Improved ride auto-connect and disconnect
* Improved app and ride state sync
* Refreshed icon and app metadata
